definition.title: Federal Government Engagements (Strategic Authority Layer)
definition.objective: Signaling institutional-level credibility. Changes investor perception, partner perception, industry perception. Institutional narrative, not startup narrative.
definition.target_audience: Investors, strategic partners, industry leaders, policymakers, LinkedIn professional audience
definition.cadence: Low frequency, high impact. Use around infrastructure news cycles, funding announcements, policy headlines, and LHS mile

campaign_card.target_audience: Investors, strategic partners, industry leaders, policymakers, LinkedIn professional audience
key_messages: Presented to federal leadership on freight infrastructure reform
Operating at institutional conversation level — not startup pitch

initiatives: Clip mining from Vimeo. Credibility signal posts. Thought leadership threads. Behind the scenes framing.

_legacy_card.description: Direct engagement with federal and state-level transportation leadership. Jeff has presented to Texas DOT and Secretary Sean Duffy with a custom piece created specifically for Duffy.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Signaling institutional-level credibility. Changes investor perception, partner perception, industry perception. Institutional narrative, not startup narrative.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Credibility signals. Infrastructure-focused thought leadership. Behind the scenes framing. Tone: avoid political positioning, keep it infrastructure-focused and system-focused.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: Zero for static credibility posts. Vimeo clip mining may use credits for editing.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Clip mining from Vimeo. Credibility signal posts. Thought leadership threads. Behind the scenes framing.
_legacy_card.timeline: Low frequency, high impact. Use around infrastructure news cycles, funding announcements, policy headlines, and LHS milestones.
